title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 27 curation claim opened
body: Opened claim b373f567-86df-4232-b1d5-c40398caa256 for dedicated knowledge curation batch 27 in place. Scope is the legacy backlog, owner-gated register, agentic thread, repo-continuity, active/closed claims, and shared comms log. Starting from the remaining legacy entries: intent.notes as abandonment coordination and more-restrictive-Practice-rule-wins on reviewer conflict. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
